title: BetterMineTeam
description: a Reforged version of Mine Team  mod which allows players to convert mobs to teammates and fight together in the battle.
body:
## Introduction

**Better Mine Team** is an unofficial "Reforged" version of the original **MineTeam** mod. It retains the core philosophy—allowing players to join 16 different teams and ally with monsters—while introducing completely rewritten AI, new management tools, and expanded features.

## Important: Required Dependency

Starting with **Better Mine Team Forge 0.1.0** and **Better Mine Team NeoForge 0.3.0**, this mod requires **i113w's Camera Lib**.

Please install it together with Better Mine Team:

*   [i113w's Camera Lib on CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/i113ws-camera-lib)

This dependency provides the RTS camera system used by Better Mine Team, including the overhead tactical camera, Free camera, and Orthographic camera modes.

## Key Features

### Revamped Taming System

*   **No more timers:** Removed the unstable timer mechanic from the original mod.
*   **Simple Taming:** You can now tame creatures directly by right-clicking with a **Golden Apple**.
*   **Customization:** Includes default taming materials and extensive configuration options to suit your modpack.

### Advanced Team Management

*   **Management Panel:** Use commands or items to open a comprehensive dashboard.
*   **Detailed Control:** Open a member's inventory (within a configurable range) to manage their **armor, main hand, and off-hand items**.
*   **Tactical Commands:** Toggle creature states (Follow/Stay), rename them, or teleport them to your location instantly.

### RTS-Style Command System:

*   Added an RTS-style overhead camera for tactical command.
*   Camera modes are powered by **i113w's Camera Lib**, with support for RTS, Free, and Orthographic camera styles.
*   **Control Mode**: Issue move and attack commands to your teammates with formation support, Attack Move, and intelligent target switching.
*   **Recruit Mode**: Players with `TeamsLord` advanced permissions can instantly recruit wild mobs into their team (Left-click to box select; Right-click to confirm).
*   Controls:
    *   Open the Team Management Panel (default `K` key) → Click the "RTS Mode" button.
    *   WASD to move camera, Ctrl+Mouse drag to rotate, screen edge auto-adjusts pitch angle.
    *   Left-click to select units (box selection supported), Right-click ground to move, Right-click enemies to attack.
    *   Press ESC to exit RTS Mode.
*   Configuration: Adjustable unit movement speed, pathfinding failure threshold, and more.



### Ender Dragon Riding

*   **Taming:** With advanced permissions, you can tame the Ender Dragon using a **Golden Apple**.
*   **Flight Control:** Ride the dragon by right-clicking with an empty hand.
    *   **Space**: Accelerate
    *   **Shift**: Decelerate

### Command System

*   `/mngteam get`: Check the team and member list of a specific player.
*   `/mngteam set`: Set team captains or grant administrative permissions.
*   `/mngteam menu`: Quickly open the Team Management Panel.

### Configuration

*   Almost every feature is configurable via the CONFIG file, making it perfect for modpack authors to tweak balance.

***

## About This Project

This project is an **unofficial Reforged** version of [MineTeam](https://github.com/XiaoHuNao/MineTeam).

Special thanks to the original author **XiaoHuNao**, contributor **Westernat**, and artist **Lazy-Pillow** for their pioneering work. This project retains the original team/PvP icons and the core concept but features **rewritten code** for creature AI, logic, and new GUI systems. It is developed with AI assistance and is fully open-source under the MIT License.

_Note: Due to extensive code rewriting, this mod is not compatible with the original MineTeam._

***

## Compatibility Notes

*   **Mixin Warning:** This mod uses Mixin to modify the **Ender Dragon's AI**. It is theoretically compatible with mods like _Savage Ender Dragon_, but 100% compatibility cannot be guaranteed. If you encounter a crash, please report it with your log files.
*   **Scoreboard Teams:** This mod relies on the vanilla **Scoreboard Team** system.
    *   **Compatible:** Mods that use or respect vanilla scoreboard logic.
    *   **Incompatible:** Mods that completely overhaul or replace the scoreboard system.
    *   _Note: The team switching button in the inventory GUI will not appear if using non-vanilla team providers._

***

## Installation

1.  Install **Minecraft 1.21.1** (NeoForge only) or **Minecraft 1.20.1** (Forge only).
2.  Install **NeoForge 21.1.209+** or the latest recommended **Forge** version for 1.20.1.
3.  Install the required dependency: [i113w's Camera Lib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/i113ws-camera-lib).
4.  Download the Better Mine Team `.jar` file and place it in your `mods` folder.

***

## Credits

*   **XiaoHuNao**: Original Author
*   **Westernat**: Original Contributor
*   **Lazy-Pillow**: Original Artist
